Developed by [[Bossikan/Rendili]], the '''R-97 Quartermaster Droid''' was designed to run storage areas with maximum efficiency. Its four arms helped it to process requisitions quickly, while its legs could extend the height of the droid to three meters, allowing it to reach high shelving. A built-in [[micro-scanner]] allowed the droid to keep track of all stores and inventory.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Showdown (The Kathol Rift)|book=The Kathol Rift|reprint=yes}}
